name: Jungle-Claw Bot
oracle_text: Alt-Mode (Beast Mode) — {1}: Until your next turn, ~'s base power and toughness become 3/3 and it gains trample. Activate only as a sorcery.
flavor_text: In the deep green of prehistoric Earth, even a machine must adapt to survive the predators.
design_notes: This card is designed for the RG Primal Dominance archetype. By providing a low-cost creature (CMC 2) that can instantly scale into a high-power, high-impact combat threat via its Alt-Mode, it rewards aggressive playstyles. The use of trample and the jump to a 3/3 body fits the 'oversized threats' theme of the archetype while staying within Green's color pie (focusing on power/toughness and physical dominance).
